raw: Pick up and return pass to the library. Pass admits 2 people at 1/2 price. Online pre-reservations are no longer required for general admission visits. Online pre-registration tickets are still available for those that would like to purchase tickets in advance at www.towerhillbg.org/planyourvisit using access code LIBDI Pick up the library pass the day before your visit. You will need to show it AND your booked tickets upon arrival at the Garden.
